headline: U.S. companies pouring swelling cash balances into growth plans - Morgan Stanley
summary: Investing.com -- Cash balances of U.S. companies swelled in the first quarter of 2026, with most companies aggressively deploying money back into their businesses, according to Morgan Stanley.
